docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DATTA, DEBAJYOTI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAPOSO, JOSE $1,425.52 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DEBAJYOTI DATTA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE RAPOSO IS PRESENT. WAYNE PATANIAN, WITNESS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DATTA, DEBAJYOTI AS TO DEFENDANT RAPOSO, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-31-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAPOSO, JOSE
